भाग पर म瀇य म犆 अशोक 瀡त瀓भ का 琐सह शीष榁 होगा, िजसके नीचे ““““स瀄यमेव जयते स瀄यमेव जयते स瀄यमेव जयते स瀄यमेव जयते”””” उ瀄क琉琔णत होगा, उसक琉 बाय牷 प琇रिध पर देवनागरी िलिप म犆 “भारत भारत भारत भारत” श瀑द और दाय牷 प琇रिध पर अं灡ेजी म犆 ““““INDIA”””” श瀑द होगा। 琐सह शीष榁 के नीचे 牱पये का 灹तीक ““““ ”””” और अंतररा玘ीय अंक犘 म犆 अं琈कत मू瀖य “350” “350” “350” “350” भी होगा । पृ玙 भाग पृ玙 भाग पृ玙 भाग पृ玙 भाग िस猳े के इस भाग पर म瀇य म犆 ““““त榐त त榐त त榐त त榐त 炈ी ह琇रमं琈दर जी पटना सािहब 炈ी ह琇रमं琈दर जी पटना सािहब 炈ी ह琇रमं琈दर जी पटना सािहब 炈ी ह琇रमं琈दर जी पटना सािहब”””” का िच灴 होगा तथा िच灴 म犆 देवनागरी म犆 ““““त榐त त榐त त榐त त榐त 炈ी 炈ी 炈ी 炈ी ह琇रमं琈दर जी पटना सािहब ह琇रमं琈दर जी पटना सािहब ह琇रमं琈दर जी पटना सािहब ह琇रमं琈दर जी पटना सािहब”””” उ瀄क琉琔णत होगा। िस榉के क琉 ऊपरी प琇रिध पर देवनागरी िलिप म犆 ““““炈ी गु牲 गो琐वद 琐सह जी का 炈ी गु牲 गो琐वद 琐सह जी का 炈ी गु牲 गो琐वद 琐सह जी का 炈ी गु牲 गो琐वद 琐सह जी का 350 350 350 350वां 灹काशो瀄स वां 灹काशो瀄स वां 灹काशो瀄स वां 灹काशो瀄सवववव”””” और िनचली प琇रिध पर अं灡ेजी म犆 "350 "350 "350 "350thththth PRAKASH UTSAV OF SRI GURU GOBIND PRAKASH UTSAV OF SRI GURU GOBIND PRAKASH UTSAV OF SRI GURU GOBIND PRAKASH UTSAV OF SRI GURU GOBIND SINGH JI" SINGH JI" SINGH JI" SINGH JI" उ瀄क琉琔णत होगा। िस榉के के बाय牷 और दाय牷 प琇रिध पर अंतररा瀠灩ीय अंक犘 म犆 वष榁 ''1666'' और ''2016'' अं琈कत होगा। दूसरी अनुसूची दूसरी अनुसूची दूसरी अनुसूची दूसरी अनुसूची (िनयम 5 देख犆) (िनयम 5 देख犆) (िनयम 5 देख犆) (िनयम 5 देख犆) िस猳े का अं琈कत मू瀖य मानक वजन अनुमत छूट संघटन म犆 मानक वजन म犆 (1) (2) (3) (4) तीन सौ पचास 牱पये 35 灡ाम रजत म犆 1/500वां िह瀡सा कम या अिधक अथा榁त रजत के अंश म犆 灹ित 1000 म犆 498 से 502 तक का अंतर हो सकेगा । 1/100वां जमा या घटा अथा榁त् वजन 34.65 灡ाम से 35.35 灡ाम के बीच हो सकता है । [फा. सं. 04/03/2016-िस猳ा] ईि瀉सता िम灴ा, अवर सिचव MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Economic Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 23rd March, 2018 G.S.R. 281(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clauses (d) and (e) of sub-section (2) of section 24 of the Coinage Act, 2011 (11 of 2011), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules, namely:- 1. Short title and commencement.—(1) These rules may be called the Coinage (Issue of Commemorative coin on the occasion of 350th Birth Anniversary of Shri Guru Gobind Singh Ji) Rules, 2018. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. Denomination of Coins.—The coin of three hundred fifty rupees denomination shall be coined at the Mint for issue under the authority of the Central Government to commemorate the occasion of “350th Birth Anniversary of Shri Guru Gobind Singh Ji ”. -- 2 of 3 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 3. Dimension and composition of coin.—The coin of the denominations mentioned in rule 2 shall conform to the following dimensions and composition, namely:— Denomination of the coin Shape and outside diameter Number of Serrations Metal Composition (1) (2) (3) (4) Three Hundred Fifty Rupees Circular 44 millimeter 200 Quaternary Alloy Silver - 50 Per cent Copper - 40 Per cent Nickel - 05 Per cent Zinc - 05 Per cent 4. Design.—The design of the coin shall be as specified in the First Schedule to these rules. 5. Standard weight and remedy allowed.—The Standard weight of the coin of the above denomination coined to commemorate the occasion of 350th Birth Anniversary of Shri Guru Gobind Singh Ji and the remedy allowed in making of such coin shall be as specified in the Second Schedule to these rules. FIRST SCHEDULE (See Rule 4) THREE HUNDRED FIFTY RUPEES OBVERSE: This face of the coin shall bear the Lion Capitol of Ashoka Pillar in the centre with the legend ““““स瀄यमेव जयते स瀄यमेव जयते स瀄यमेव जयते स瀄यमेव जयते”””” inscribed below, flanked on the left periphery with the word ““““ भारत भारत भारत भारत ”””” in the Devanagari script and on the right periphery with the word “INDIA” in English and it shall also bear the Rupee symbol “`” and denominational value “350” in International Numerals below the Lion Capitol. REVERSE: This face of the coin shall bear the picture of “Takht Shri Harimandir Ji Patna Sahib” in the centre, with inscription """"त榐त 炈ी ह琇रमं琈दर जी पटना सािहब त榐त 炈ी ह琇रमं琈दर जी पटना सािहब त榐त 炈ी ह琇रमं琈दर जी पटना सािहब त榐त 炈ी ह琇रमं琈दर जी पटना सािहब”””” in Devanagari in the picture. The inscription ““““炈ी गु牱 गोिब瀈द 琐सह जी का 35 炈ी गु牱 गोिब瀈द 琐सह जी का 35 炈ी गु牱 गोिब瀈द 琐सह जी का 35 炈ी गु牱 गोिब瀈द 琐सह जी का 350000वां वां वां वां 灹काशो瀄सव 灹काशो瀄सव 灹काशो瀄सव 灹काशो瀄सव”””” shall be written in Devanagari script on the upper periphery and “350TH PRAKASH UTSAV OF SRI GURU GOBIND SINGH JI” in English language on the lower periphery of the coin are made. The year “1666” and “2016” in international numerals shall be flanked on the left and right periphery of the coin. SECOND SCHEDULE (See Rule 5) Denomination of coin Standard Weight Remedy Allowed In composition In Standard Weight (1) (2) (3) (4) Three Hundred Fifty Rupees 35 Grams 1/500th plus or minus for silver, that is to say the Silver content may vary from 498 to 502 per 1000. 1/100th plus or minus that is to say, weight could vary from 34.65grams to 35.35 grams. [F.No. 04/03/2016-Coin] IPSITA MITRA, Under Secy.
